text: Inside this futuristic, laboratory-like environment filled with the blue and orange glow of LED lights, I am invigorated by the energy of innovation. The "R+D" sign on the wall conjures feelings of curiosity and anticipation; I am surrounded by the pulse of research and discovery. The sense of being in a creative, experimental space makes me hopeful—each object and screen seems alive with possibility. I feel a sense of wonder, as if I am on the threshold of new ideas, eager to engage with whatever comes next.
